---
name: Expo typedRoutes regeneration
description: Why new expo-router screens fail typecheck and how to fix it in banco-mobile
---

When `experiments.typedRoutes` is on (banco-mobile), `router.push("/new/route")`
fails typecheck with "not assignable to parameter of type RelativePathString..."
until the typed-route declarations are regenerated.

**Why:** Route types live in `.expo/types/router.d.ts` and are generated by the
Expo CLI only when the dev server boots and scans the route tree. Adding a screen
file alone does not update them.

**How to apply:** After adding/renaming a screen, (re)start the `artifacts/banco-mobile: expo`
workflow, then re-run typecheck. If the expo server itself won't boot, fix that
first — a missing/declared-but-uninstalled dep (e.g. `@shopify/flash-list` present
in package.json but absent from node_modules) crashes Metro before types generate;
run `pnpm install` at the workspace root to sync, then restart.
